title: HOOK 3 — Ginger buries with her nose
prompt: Close-up in @backyard-kitchen, slow push-in. @Ginger uses her wet black nose to push a small mound of dark soil over a golden bagel sitting in a freshly-dug hole next to the petunia flowerbed. The snout pushes soil left, then right, then satisfied sniffs the spot. Ginger snorts proudly: "Snrf!" Tail wagging high. Soft afternoon sunlight, no humans visible.
